title: Author three pilot category content bundles
description: Create MVP content for 桌面+学习, 海底+潜水, 公园+野餐 using the five-layer model. Keep content realistic, common, visually clear, individually selectable, and strongly tied to the scene. Map pilot bundles into the legacy runtime view without full-library rewrite.
convergence: 桌面+学习, 海底+潜水, 公园+野餐 each have complete five-layer bundles.
visible_small_items are grouped, block-like, or clearly supported by a surface.
conditional_items include their support/hanging/context dependency in naming or comments.
blocked_or_risky contains risky or default-excluded concepts and does not appear in legacy buckets.
Legacy BLIND_BOXES remains importable and exposes all expected bucket keys.
